use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 2 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER WITH NEUROFIBROMATOSIS TYPE 1 (NF1) WHO HAVE SYMPTOMATIC, INOPERABLE PLEXIFORM NEUROFIBROMAS (PN)

indications.text:
KOSELUGO is indicated for the treatment of adult and pediatric patients 1 year of age and older with neurofibromatosis
type 1 (NF1) who have symptomatic, inoperable plexiform neurofibromas (PN) [see Dosage and Administration (2)].

KOSELUGO is indicated for the treatment of pediatric patients 2 years of age and older with
neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1) who have symptomatic, inoperable plexiform neurofibromas (PN).

KOSELUGO is indicated for the treatment of pediatric patients 1 year of age and older with neurofibromatosis type 1
(NF1) who have symptomatic, inoperable plexiform neurofibromas (PN) [see Dosage and Administration (2)].

KOSELUGOis indicated for the treatment of pediatricpatients2 years of age and older with
neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1) who havesymptomatic,inoperable plexiform neurofibromas (PN).

KOSELUGO is indicated for the treatment of pediatric patients 2 years of age and older with
neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1) who have symptomatic, inoperable plexiform neurofibromas (PN).
